title: Second fusion summit at UW signals the Midwest’s rise as a fusion powerhouse
summary_en: The event brought together researchers, industry leaders, government officials and investors to learn about and discuss fusion as a viable energy source.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校举办第二届核聚变峰会 彰显美国中西部崛起为核聚变产业高地

title: Primatologist Karen Strier elected to the American Philosophical Society
summary_en: The highly selective distinction honors her more than four decades studying and working to protect an endangered monkey species.
title_cn: 灵长类动物学家凯伦·斯特里尔当选美国哲学学会会员

title: Badgers buckle down for finals
summary_en: In study pods, on the Terrace, at the libraries and everywhere in between, Badgers are getting ready for the semester's last hurdle: finals.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校师生全力备战期末考试

title: History scholar Stephen Kantrowitz awarded Andrew Carnegie Fellowship
summary_en: Kantrowitz is one of 24 scholars the Carnegie Corporation of New York selected from among 381 nominations across the country.
title_cn: 历史学学者斯蒂芬·坎特罗维茨获颁安德鲁·卡内基研究员称号

title: UW’s Public Tech Media Lab helps bridge the gap between AI and journalism
summary_en: Led by journalism professor Tomás Dodds, the new lab has partnered with local newsrooms to help them develop AI guidelines and systems that adhere to core reporting values and standards.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学公共科技媒体实验室助力搭建人工智能与新闻业沟通桥梁

title: UW–Madison finalizes 2025–27 compensation strategy
summary_en: The strategy is intended to support the university’s total compensation philosophy, which is to be a market-competitive employer that supports UW staff and faculty.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校正式出台2025—2027财年薪酬战略
